description_long: This bollard features a tall, cylindrical body with a smooth, uniform surface and a slightly wider circular base plate, likely designed for secure mounting to the ground. The top of the bollard is capped with a distinctive, angled dome that appears to be made of a different, darker material, possibly metal or a high-durability polymer. The base plate has visible bolt holes, indicating it is intended to be surface-mounted for stability in urban environments. The overall finish is clean and industrial, with no visible markings, chains, or connectors. The bollard is likely constructed from steel or a similar metal for strength and durability, with the cap providing additional visual or functional distinction. Its design is utilitarian, suitable for controlling vehicle access or protecting pedestrian areas.
description: A tall, cylindrical metal bollard with a wide anchored base and a distinctive angled dome cap, finished in light and dark tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical body and the angled dome cap, with the base plate and bolt holes visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical cylindrical form and the full face of the angled dome cap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the angled dome cap and the cylindrical body, with the base plate visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rounded back of the dome cap and the cylindrical shaft, with the base plate in clear view.
